_structure: Split into per-phase chunks. This file is the manifest. Load phase chunks individually as needed.

data.title: Prototype Roadmap — Base System to First Testable Version
data.scope: Base prototype on arithmetic expressions and simple linear equations to first measurable test result. Excludes: reasoned library, second meta-level system, weighted graphs, hyperedges (unless Phase 6 forces it), full self-evolving rewrite system.

known_risks.risk: GI cost at rule firing scale
Encoding design is load-bearing — poor encoding limits discoverability
Burn-in cold start — seed rules are only bootstrap before library accumulates
Unbounded parameter growth in layer hierarchy
